LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeLauncher_RequiresTablet: Requires a pawn equipped with a military tablet.
LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeLauncher_AlreadyFired: The Switchblade launch canister has already been fired.
LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeTablet_SelectLoiter_Desc: Choose the center of the linked Switchblade's loitering circle.
LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeTablet_Target_Desc: Designate a target point for the linked Switchblade. It will turn onto the attack heading, then dive at 1.8x loiter speed.
LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeTablet_ReturnLoiter_Desc: Cancel the attack run before impact and return the linked Switchblade to loitering flight.
LanguageData.HD_SwitchbladeTablet_ReturnLoiter_NotNee: The linked Switchblade is already loitering.
LanguageData.HD_M47Dragon_ChangeTarget_Desc: Redirect the in-flight M222 missile to a new target. Steering begins on the next guidance pulse.
LanguageData.HD_M47Dragon_ChangeTarget_WireBroken: The M47 Dragon guidance wire is broken.
LanguageData.HD_M47Dragon_ActiveMissileBlocksFire: Cannot fire while the previously launched M222 missile is still in flight.
LanguageData.HD_M47Dragon_ChangeTarget_HelodOnly: Only a Helod operator can redirect an M222 missile in flight.
